CConvertze
ImagesPDFDev ToolsText

Convert anything.
Nothing leaves your device.

Free, fast tools for images, PDFs, text and everyday dev work. Everything runs right here in your browser, so your files never leave your hands.

Files stay on your device · No accounts · Open source

No tools match that search.

Pick up where you left off

Image tools

Convert, resize, compress, crop and rotate images, with batch support and zip downloads. Everything is processed by your browser and stays on your device.

Image ConverterConvert between PNG, JPG and WebP, alone or in batches. Image ResizerResize to exact pixels, with or without aspect lock. Image CompressorCompress by quality, or hit an exact KB target. Image CropperCenter-crop images to an exact frame size. Image RotatorFix sideways photos in exact 90° steps. Favicon GeneratorTurn one image into a full favicon pack. SVG to PNG ConverterRasterize SVG vectors at 1× to 8× scale.

PDF tools

Merge, split, compress and convert PDFs locally. Your documents stay on your device from the moment you pick them to the moment you download the result.

Merge PDFCombine multiple PDFs, in the order you choose. Split PDFExtract pages or ranges into separate PDFs. Compress PDFShrink heavy PDFs to a fraction of their size. Images to PDFCombine JPG, PNG or WebP photos into one A4 PDF. PDF to ImagesEvery page rendered as a JPG or PNG. PDF to TextPull the text layer out; copy or download it. HTML to PDFRender an .html file into a paged A4 PDF. Markdown to PDFTurn .md and .txt files into clean PDFs.

Developer tools

Textarea-first utilities for JSON, YAML, CSV, Base64, hashes, JWTs, regex, diffs and more. Paste, see the result live, copy out.

JSON FormatterBeautify or minify JSON live, with clear errors. JSON to YAML ConverterBoth directions, live, with validation. CSV to JSON ConverterHeader-row CSV to a JSON array, and back. Base64 Encode / DecodeText and file modes, both directions. Hash GeneratorChecksum any text or file instantly. JWT DecoderInspect tokens locally; expiry made readable. Timestamp ConverterSeconds, millis, ISO and local, live. Text DiffSide-by-side inputs, green/red line diff. Regex TesterLive match highlighting, flags, groups. Color ConverterPaste any CSS color, get every format. URL Encode / DecodePercent-encoding, both directions, live. Markdown PreviewType Markdown, see rendered HTML instantly. UUID GeneratorCryptographically random v4 UUIDs, one or many. Password GeneratorLength, character sets, cryptographic randomness. QR Code GeneratorAny text or URL to a downloadable QR code.

Text tools

Count, clean, convert and generate text. Word counts, case changes, sorted lists, slugs and placeholder copy, all live as you type.

Word CounterLive word, character, sentence and paragraph counts. Case ConverterUPPER, lower, Title, camelCase, snake_case and more. Sort & Dedupe LinesSort lines A-Z, remove duplicates, reverse, trim. Lorem Ipsum GeneratorParagraphs, sentences or words of filler text. Slug GeneratorClean, lowercase, hyphenated slugs from any text.
Convertze is a free, open source side project. Your files stay on your device. Found a bug? Tell us on GitHub. Image tools · PDF tools · Developer tools · Text tools · GitHub
